name: Krog Street Market
deal: Converted warehouse with food options

name: Ponce City Market
address: 675 Ponce De Leon Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30308
deal: Food, coffee, carnival attractions. 9 Mile Station: beer garden on roof. Skyline Park.

name: Atlanta BeltLine
deal: High Line vibes — 22-mile loop of multi-use trails through Atlanta neighborhoods

name: Mary Mac's Tea Room
address: 224 Ponce De Leon Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30308
deal: "Best chicken and waffles I've ever had in my life" –Bryan

name: SkyView Atlanta
deal: 20-story Ferris wheel with a great view of the skyline. $15

name: World of Coca-Cola
deal: Museum dedicated to the history of Coca-Cola. $18

name: Georgia Aquarium
deal: One of the world's largest aquariums. $37

name: Centennial Olympic Park
address: 265 Park Ave W NW, Atlanta, GA 30313
deal: Olympic rings, fountain, and great views of the downtown skyline

name: High Museum of Art
deal: Atlanta's leading art museum with an impressive permanent collection. $17

name: Piedmont Park
deal: Large urban park with botanical garden, skyline views, and weekend farmers markets

name: Little Five Points
deal: Eclectic neighborhood with breweries, indie food, and funky shops

name: Chattahoochee Food Works
deal: Huge food hall with a wide variety of options

name: Chiang Kai-shek Memorial Hall & Liberty Square
address: No. 21, Zhongshan S Rd, Zhongzheng District, Taipei
deal: Changing of the guard every hour on the hour inside the Memorial Hall

name: Longshan Temple
deal: One of Taipei's oldest and most visited temples. Active place of worship with incense and prayer offerings.

name: Jiufen Old Street
address: Jiufen, Ruifang District, New Taipei City
deal: Narrow hillside alley with food, tea houses, and shops — said to have inspired Spirited Away. Combine with Shifen and Keelung Night Market.

name: Shifen Waterfall & Shifen Old Street
address: Shifen, Pingxi District, New Taipei City
deal: One of the most scenic waterfalls in Taiwan. "It's awesome." Try the peanut ice cream on the old street.

name: Ningxia Night Market
deal: "Best food market in Taipei" — small, local, and packed with great street food. Bib Gourmand: Yuan Huan Pien Oyster Egg Omelette.

name: Taipei 101
address: No. 7, Section 5, Xinyi Road, Xinyi District, Taipei
deal: Iconic skyscraper with shopping and dining. Free perfect view from Hotspot 101 (No. 2, Lane 253, Songren Rd). Simple Kaffa nearby — owner won 2016 World Barista Championship.

name: Elephant Mountain (Xiangshan)
deal: Go at sunset for panoramic views of Taipei with Taipei 101 in the foreground

name: Huashan 1914 Creative Park
address: No. 1, Section 1, Bade Road, Zhongzheng District, Taipei
deal: Former tobacco factory converted into a creative hub with exhibitions, pop-up stores, restaurants, and live music

name: Hoan Kiem Lake & Ngoc Son Temple
deal: Iconic red Huc Bridge leads to Ngoc Son Temple on the lake. Tran Quoc Pagoda nearby is the oldest pagoda in Hanoi — visit at sunset.

name: Café Giang
address: 39 Nguyễn Hữu Huân, Lý Thái Tổ, Hoàn Kiếm, Hanoi
deal: Origin of Vietnamese Egg Coffee — a must-try Hanoi specialty

name: Temple of Literature
address: 58 Quốc Tử Giám, Đống Đa, Hanoi
deal: Vietnam's first university, dating to 1070. Beautiful grounds with traditional Vietnamese architecture.

name: Trang An
neighborhood: Ninh Binh (Ha Long Bay on land)
deal: UNESCO World Heritage Site. Boat ride through caves, temples, and limestone mountains surrounded by rice paddies.

name: Ha Long Bay
address: Ha Long City, Quảng Ninh Province
deal: UNESCO World Heritage Site with emerald waters and towering limestone islands. Toured via Aqua of the Sea overnight cruise.

name: Chen Clan Ancestral Hall
address: 中山七路34号, Liwan District, Guangzhou
deal: Beautifully ornate ancestral hall with intricate carvings, wood engravings, and ceramic sculptures

name: Shamian Island
deal: European-style colonial street on a small island in the Pearl River — shaded avenues and old consulate buildings

name: Victoria Peak
deal: Best viewpoint for Hong Kong's skyline — only go if it's not cloudy. Use Octopus card for the tram. Sit inside on the right going up. Peak Galleria has a free observation deck.

name: Man Mo Temple
address: 124-126 Hollywood Rd, Sheung Wan, Hong Kong
deal: Three temples combined into one, dedicated to the gods of literature and war. Take the Central Mid-Levels Escalator (longest outdoor covered escalator in the world) up from Central Market.

name: Wong Tai Sin Temple
address: 2 Chuk Yuen Village, Wong Tai Sin, Kowloon
deal: "Place to come for good fortune, have prayers answered!!" Nearby: Chi Lin Nunnery — largest hand-built wooden building in the world, and Nan Lian Garden (Tang dynasty style).

name: Tsim Sha Tsui Promenade
address: Tsim Sha Tsui, Kowloon, Hong Kong
deal: Watch the Symphony of Lights show over the harbor at night. Star Ferry across the water has great harbor views — sit on the outdoor deck.

name: Ruins of Saint Paul
address: Rua de São Paulo, Santo António, Macau
deal: Striking façade of a 17th-century Catholic church destroyed by fire in the 1800s — Macao's most iconic landmark. Senado Square nearby mixes Chinese and Portuguese architecture.

name: Lord Stow's Bakery
address: 1 Rua do Tassara, Coloane Village, Macau
deal: The original creator of Macao's famous egg tarts — a must-visit in the peaceful historic Coloane Village. Also try Fernando's authentic Portuguese restaurant nearby.

name: Tian Tan Buddha (Big Buddha)
address: Ngong Ping, Lantau Island, Hong Kong
deal: 112-foot tall bronze Buddha, 268 steps to the top, took 3 years to build. Take the Ngong Ping Cable Car. Po Lin Monastery and Tai O Fishing Village (stilt houses, pink dolphins) nearby.

name: Fushimi Inari Shrine
deal: Arrive ~7:00 AM for the ~2-hour hike through thousands of iconic vermillion torii gates. Don't miss the bamboo grove. [9.x/10 food nearby]

name: Kodai-ji Temple & Bamboo Grove
deal: Beautiful Zen temple with a stunning bamboo grove. Walk Sannenzaka and Ninenzaka traditional streets nearby — very crowded but iconic. $7

name: Yasaka Pagoda
deal: Walk up Yasaka-dori for the iconic view of this five-story pagoda rising above the old Kyoto rooftops. Shirakawa Canal and Hanami-koji Street nearby.

name: Dotonbori
deal: The most iconic sight in Osaka — neon-covered buildings and signs along the canal. Charcoal Grilled Yakiniku Senzou [9.7/10] and Maccha House [9.2/10] nearby.

name: Nakatanidou
deal: Go before 3 PM to watch them pound mochi by hand — and definitely buy some. Mahoroba Daibutsu Pudding nearby [9.8/10]. Kaiten Sushi Ginza Onodera also nearby [9.7/10].

name: Nara Park
deal: Free-roaming deer park in the heart of Nara. Walk off the usual path to find tamer deer. Yoshiki-en Garden is nearby and beautiful.

name: Tōdai-ji Temple
deal: Houses a 16-meter-high Buddha statue inside the largest wooden building in the world. Climb the Nigatsu-do Hall walkway for views over Nara. $5. Soba-dokoro Kitahara nearby [9.1/10].

name: Omicho Market
deal: Kanazawa's famous covered market — try the fresh seafood!! Great crabs and sushi.

name: Kenroku-en Garden
deal: One of Japan's top three landscape gardens. Stunning in all seasons — feudal-era garden with ponds and stone lanterns. $4

name: Nagamachi Samurai District
deal: Best-preserved samurai district in Japan — earthen walls, narrow lanes, and traditional residences. Gyokusen-immaru Garden and Oyama-jinja Shrine nearby.

name: teamLab Borderless
address: Azabudai Hills Garden Plaza B, 1-2-4 Azabudai, Minato City, Tokyo
deal: Immersive digital art experience where artworks move freely between rooms. 10–10:30 AM entry. Detour Coffee in Shibuya nearby.

name: Shibuya Scramble Crossing
deal: World's busiest pedestrian crossing. Miyashita Park has a rooftop with cafes. Harajuku Okonomiyaki Yai-yai nearby [9.6/10]. Takeshita Street for trendy Gen Z shopping.

name: Tsutaya Books Daikanyama
deal: One of the most beautiful bookstores in the world. Log Road Daikanyama nearby has boutiques and Spring Valley Brewery on converted train tracks. Urara [9.5/10] is a nearby standout restaurant.

name: Sensō-ji Temple
deal: Tokyo's oldest and most widely visited temple. Kaminarimon gate leads to Nakamise Shopping Street. Kappabashi Kitchen Street nearby for world-class cooking knives.

name: Crater Lake National Park
deal: Rim Village has panoramic views of the deepest lake in the US and Wizard Island. Discovery Point Trail (2.4 mi) follows the rim for stunning views.

name: Cannon Beach
deal: Iconic sea stacks including Haystack Rock, Face Rock viewpoint, and tidepools

name: Multnomah Falls
address: Historic Columbia River Hwy, Corbett, OR 97019
deal: Oregon's most visited natural attraction — a stunning two-tier waterfall dropping 620 feet in the Columbia River Gorge

name: Cape Perpetua
address: Cape Perpetua Scenic Area, Yachats, OR 97498
deal: Devil's Churn and Thor's Well — dramatic volcanic coastline with sea spray and blowholes that swallow and shoot water

name: Silver Falls State Park
address: 20024 Silver Falls Hwy SE, Sublimity, OR 97385
deal: Trail of Ten Falls hike passes South Falls and Lower South Falls — you can walk behind the waterfalls

name: Bandon Beach
deal: Dramatic sea stacks, Face Rock viewpoint, and accessible tidepools. Cape Arago / Shore Acres / Simpson Reef nearby for sea lions.

name: Miradouro da Senhora do Monte
deal: Best view of Lisbon — small romantic hilltop park. [3 recommendations]

name: Castelo de São Jorge
address: R. de Santa Cruz do Castelo, 1100-129 Lisboa
deal: Moorish castle with sweeping views over the city and the Tagus River. 7.50€

name: Jerónimos Monastery
deal: UNESCO World Heritage Site — stunning Gothic Manueline-style monastery with intricate stone carvings. [4 recommendations] 12€

name: Belém Tower
deal: UNESCO World Heritage Site and symbol of Lisbon. Don't bother going inside — not worth it. [5 recommendations] 8.50€

name: Pastéis de Belém
deal: The original pastel de nata bakery since 1837 — the only place with the secret recipe. [3 recommendations]

name: Time Out Market
deal: Excellent indoor food market featuring the best chefs and restaurants in Lisbon under one roof

name: National Palace of Pena
deal: Fairytale Moorish-revival castle painted in vivid yellow and red atop the Sintra mountains. [5 recommendations] 17€

name: Quinta da Regaleira
deal: UNESCO World Heritage gothic mansion with mysterious initiation wells, romantic chapels, and extraordinary stonework. [5 recommendations] 12€

name: Cabo da Roca
deal: Westernmost point of continental Europe — dramatic Atlantic cliffs and one of the best views in Europe

name: Torre dos Clérigos
address: R. de São Filipe de Nery, 4050-546 Porto
deal: Iconic Baroque bell tower built in the mid-1700s — one of Porto's most emblematic monuments. Church free, Tower 6€. [5 recommendations]

name: Ponte Luís I
deal: Double-deck iron bridge over the Douro River linking Porto and Vila Nova de Gaia. Walk the upper deck for views. Cross to find wine cellars in Gaia. [5 recommendations]

name: Cais de Ribeira
deal: Colorful medieval riverside district — very touristy, great for photos but avoid eating here. Conga (Portuguese sandwiches) and Half Rabbit are better nearby options.

name: Mount Rushmore
deal: 60-foot presidential faces carved into granite in the Black Hills. Best lighting in the morning.

name: Wind Cave National Park
deal: One of only two genetically pure bison herds in the country! Garden of Eden cave tour. Lookout Point Loop (2.2 mi) is prime for bison, pronghorn, and elk sightings.

name: Custer State Park
deal: 18-mile Wildlife Loop to see bison, pronghorn, and wild burros. Drive Needles Highway to Cathedral Spires Trail. Sylvan Lake is gorgeous.

name: Black Elk Peak Trail
address: Sylvan Lake Trailhead, Custer State Park, SD
deal: Highest point east of the Rockies. 7.1-mile loop — go up Trail 9, down Trail 4. Harney Peak Lookout tower at the summit with sweeping views.

name: Badlands National Park
deal: Notch Trail (1.3 mi) is the best trail in the park. Drive the Badlands Loop Road for overlooks — Pinnacles Overlook at sunset is stunning. Turn onto Sage Creek Rim Road and Roberts Prairie Dog Town for wildlife.

name: Lady Bird Lake
deal: 10-mile hike/bike trail that loops the lake. Austin Rowing Club rents stand-up paddleboards and kayaks by the hour.

name: Texas State Capitol
deal: Impressive state capitol building taller than the US Capitol. Free tours available.

name: South Congress Avenue
deal: Austin's most charming strip for shopping and dining — vintage shops, food trucks, and local boutiques. The Continental Club / Guero's Oak Garden for live music.

name: Rainey Street
deal: Converted bungalows turned into lively bars and restaurants — Austin's most fun nightlife street

name: Klyde Warren Park
deal: Urban park built over a freeway connecting downtown Dallas to Uptown. Food trucks, lawn games, and free programming.

name: Valley of Fire State Park
address: 29450 Valley of Fire Hwy, Overton, NV 89040
deal: Seven Wonders Loop: park at Fire Wave west lot, go clockwise to hit Fire Wave then Pink Canyon. White Domes Trail has a slot canyon. Download AllTrails before going.

name: Horseshoe Bend
deal: Iconic 270° meander of the Colorado River viewed from a cliff edge. Short 1.5-mile round trip walk from the parking lot.

name: Lower Antelope Canyon
deal: Stunning slot canyon carved by water erosion with dramatic light beams. Ken's Tours Lower Antelope Canyon. Book in advance — 5:00 PM tour.

name: Grand Canyon South Rim
deal: Desert View Watchtower for sunset. South Kaibab Trail to Ooh Aah Point. Mather Point has two great overlooks. Bright Angel Trail: turn around at Mile-and-a-Half Resthouse.

name: The Las Vegas Strip
address: Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89109
deal: Bellagio, Aria, and Venetian are the highlights. Shang Artisan Noodle and Din Tai Fung for food.

name: Degraves Street
deal: Melbourne's most iconic laneway — lined with cozy cafes and espresso bars. The epitome of Melbourne's famous coffee culture.

name: St Kilda Beach
deal: Iconic Melbourne beach with Acland Street cafes and Jacka Blvd for sunset. Little penguins nest under the pier at dusk.

name: Royal Botanic Gardens Melbourne
deal: Beautiful 100-acre gardens on the Yarra River — one of the world's finest botanic gardens. Free entry.

name: Queen Victoria Market
deal: Melbourne's largest open-air market open since 1878 — fresh produce, street food, and unique goods.

name: Brighton Beach
deal: Famous for 82 colorful Victorian-era bathing boxes lined up along the beach — one of Melbourne's most photogenic spots

name: Great Barrier Reef
deal: Outer Great Barrier Reef full-day tour from Cairns. World's largest coral reef system and UNESCO World Heritage Site.

name: Mossman Gorge
deal: River gorge carved through granite boulders, bordered by ancient Daintree rainforest. Rainforest circuit trail winds through the gorge.

name: Port Douglas
deal: Rex Smeal Park, Trinity Bay Lookout hike, and the Sugar Wharf. Perfect base for Great Barrier Reef and Daintree Rainforest day trips.

name: Twelve Apostles
address: Great Ocean Road, Port Campbell VIC 3269
deal: Iconic limestone sea stacks rising from the Southern Ocean. Start at Gibson Steps to get down to the beach. Sunrise and sunset are best.

name: Cape Otway Lightstation
deal: Australia's oldest surviving lighthouse. Maits Rest Rainforest Walk nearby. Look up into the gum trees to spot koalas!

name: Kennett River
deal: Best spot on the Great Ocean Road to see wild koalas in their natural habitat — look up into the gum trees on Grey River Road. Apollo Bay Bakery (scallop pies) nearby.

name: Hanging Rock
deal: Volcanic rock formation over 6 million years old — 30-minute walk to the peak with sweeping views. Trentham Falls (Victoria's longest single-drop waterfall) nearby.

name: Penguin Parade — Phillip Island
deal: Watch hundreds of Little Penguins waddle ashore at sunset — the world's largest little penguin colony. Book tickets in advance.
